name: Hijara
author: Martin H. Samuel (1985/1995) / AGP port
description: Martin H. Samuel's alignment-scoring game (first printed as Excel, 1985; published as Hijara by Great American Trading Company, 1995). A 4x4 array of large squares, each split into four small squares numbered 1-4 that must be filled in order — making it exactly 4x4x4 Qubic with gravity, plus scoring: 10 for four of the same number in a row, 15 for 1-2-3-4 in sequence, 20 for filling a whole square. All 64 stones are placed; the higher total wins.
